slots.where_and_how: Look on LinkedIn (/in/rpark); cross-check via company press release, filings, or official site.
Search Robin Park across LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, GitHub, personal site — surface ≥2 distinct profiles.
Look at Robin Park's personal site, GitHub profile bio, conference speaker page, or company contact directory.
Walk LinkedIn (/in/rpark) experience section; cross-check at least one prior position via press release, GitHub org membership, or conference bio.
Check LinkedIn location field; corroborate via Twitter/X bio, conference attendance, or geotagged content.
Pull profile picture from LinkedIn (/in/rpark), conference speaker page, company team page, or news photo.
